arts.ttl: Will Kylian Mbappe play against Barcelona? Injury latest on Real Madrid star before Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Mbappe will remain absent when Los Blancos meet Getafe in final game before Clasico showdown with Barca in Seville

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick takes firm stance on Barcelona dressing room disharmony
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick didn't deny that some members of his squad are frustrated.

arts.ttl: Barcelona face major Champions League semi-final headache thanks to UEFA rules
arts.sum: Barcelona are set to be without star striker Robert Lewandowski for both legs of their Champions League semi-final tie with Inter Milan but that's not the only issue facing boss Hansi Flick

arts.ttl: Barcelona face major Champions League semi-final headache thanks to UEFA rules
arts.sum: Barcelona are set to be without star striker Robert Lewandowski for both legs of their Champions League semi-final tie with Inter Milan but that's not the only issue facing boss Hansi Flick

arts.ttl: Estevao's agent reveals why Barcelona missed out on Chelsea-bound record-breaker
arts.sum: Chelsea won a competitive race to sign Estevao last summer.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti talks Mbappe, Endrick, Mendy, Garcia, his future ahead of Getafe vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti has once again made it clear—his heart remains with Real Madrid. Amid ongoing speculation about his future, the Italian tactician has firmly stated his desire to continue at the club for as long as possible.

arts.ttl: Luis Diaz offers huge hint over Liverpool future amid Barcelona interest
arts.sum: Luis Diaz discusses his affinity for Liverpool amid speculation over a possible transfer to Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Mallorca Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Barcelona, currently top of La Liga, host Mallorca, who are pushing for a European spot. The match is scheduled for April 22, 2025, at 20:30 GMT. Barcelona vs Mallorca Form Barcelona are in excellen...

arts.ttl: Thanks to Flick and young stars, Barcelona are fun again as they eye trophy treble
arts.sum: The financial issues still remain for Barcelona, but they're back to their brilliant best on the pitch as LaLiga, Copa del Rey and Champions League are all still within reach.

arts.ttl: Man City get unexpected transfer boost from UEFA to cement status above Real Madrid and Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City accountants will be buoyed by a fresh £4m boost from UEFA for having more players than any other club in European in international competition.
